title: Thai Coconut Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken, roasted flavors, and a delicious coconut-infused pilaf.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add peanuts and cook for 1 minute.
Add coconut milk, fish sauce, and soy sauce (if using). Stir to combine.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Add rice to the skillet and stir to combine with coconut mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until rice is heated through.
Stir in crispy fried shallots and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro (if desired).
Cook time will vary depending on type of rice used.
Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
